case_title: BENITEZ SILVIA VS STATE FARM INSURANCE ATTN: VIVIAN DEVINCENZI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BENITEZ SILVIA AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE ATTN: VIVIAN DEVINCENZI PHILLIPS DEDRA SHAREE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENITEZ SILVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE ATTN: VIVIAN DEVINCENZI PHILLIPS DEDRA SHAREE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
